# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2017-05-01'
    name: '[concat(subscription().id, \'/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/\', guid(resourceGroup().id))]'
    properties:
      principalId: '[reference(resourceId(\'Microsoft.Web/sites/config\', parameters(\'webAppName\'), \'2016-08-01\', \'full\')).identity.principalId]'
      roleDefinitionId: '[concat(subscription().id, \'/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/\', \'b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c\')]'
      scope: '[subscription().id]'
